title_original: Projekt ORION: Umetna inteligenca za varno mejno kontrolo
title_en_gloss: Project ORION: Artificial intelligence for safe border control
support_note: The Slovenian police page, the EU CORDIS fact sheet, the public ORION project website, the UIC public launch/website notices, and two public ORION PDF documents (a 2026-05 brochure and a 2026-05 roll-up) now support narrow claims about project identity, Horizon funding/grant metadata, AI-assisted border-management framing, privacy-preserving and advanced-biometric language, named solution modules (remote biometric enrolment / in-vehicle verification, morphing-attack detection, portable X-ray screening, vehicle visual recognition / anomaly detection, AI-driven risk assessment, queue management, privacy-preserving fuzzy search, and explainable-AI decision support), and four pilot/use-case settings across Slovenia, Romania, the United Kingdom, and Bulgaria. This strengthens reviewer-safe project-description, pilot-setting, and document-grade technical-companion wording, but still does not prove production deployment, buyer-side procurement, legality, proportionality, effectiveness, independent evaluation, or court/regulator review.
observatory_hook: Public-sector AI deployment map; policing/border-control topology; authority-weighted language coverage funnel; biometric/privacy tension flag; pilot-scenario panel.
next_verification_step: Look for one ORION-specific procurement/register, independent evaluation/audit, buyer-side technical validation, or court/regulator-facing public document; otherwise exploit the now-document-grade public technical companion pair for bounded methods/table wording.
priority_rationale: Still the package's strongest reviewer-legible multilingual row because it is now backed by a cross-family official police-plus-CORDIS companion chain rather than a police-page-only or same-family-only stack; stronger claims still require one ORION-specific procurement/register/technical, audit, evaluation, or court-facing document.
current_claim_ceiling: Direct official police page plus bounded extraction note support project existence, stated AI-assisted border-management purpose, six sub-goals, privacy-preserving framing, TRL-7 ambition, encrypted-biometric-processing language, and pilot-scenario descriptions including Slovenia risk-assessment/resource-allocation wording; they do not by themselves prove production deployment, legality, compliance outcomes, proportionality, or effectiveness.
paper_use_now: Public-sector AI deployment map; small-language official-source exemplar; legal uncertainty matrix input.
verification_route: Treat the resolved police page as the anchor source; separate quoted project-purpose language from any inferred surveillance/biometric interpretation and route uncertain translation details to review.
cycle_note: Ranked and route-coded during hostile-reviewer publication sprint; no direct-source URL was newly resolved in this cycle.
provenance_note: Discovered via Google News RSS; upgraded on 2026-06-07 by resolving the direct official police page.
direct_source_excerpt_sl: Projekt ORION (angl. Optimized Risk-based Intelligence-driven Operations for Next-generation Secure, Reliable and Privacy-preserving Border Management) je namenjen izboljšanju upravljanja meja, tudi s pomočjo umetne inteligence. Cilj je varna, zanesljiva in zasebnost ohranjajoča mejna kontrola naslednje generacije.
direct_source_excerpt_en_gloss: Project ORION is intended to improve border management, including with the help of artificial intelligence. The goal is next-generation border control that is secure, reliable, and privacy-preserving.
stated_subgoals_en_gloss: improve coordination among border, customs, and security controls
optimize resource allocation to reduce waiting times
improve threat-detection capacity, especially on roll-on/roll-off ferries
ensure interoperability with existing EU systems such as SIS, VIS, and EES
improve energy efficiency and reduce environmental impact, targeting at least a 15% carbon-footprint reduction
ensure ethical and legal compliance and protect passengers' personal data
next_threshold_event: one ORION-specific procurement/register/technical, audit, evaluation, or court-facing public companion beyond the current police-plus-CORDIS pair
threshold_gain_if_hit: Move ORION above same-family police-page depth hardening into a stronger public-sector traceability floor with cleaner project-versus-deployment wording.

title_original: Tekoäly laatii nyt täysin järjettömiä valituksia – poliisilakimies turhautui: ”Viitataan tapauksiin, joita ei ole”
title_en_gloss: AI now drafts completely absurd complaints; police lawyer frustrated: cases are cited that do not exist
support_note: Direct Yle article text now supports a narrow claim that AI-assisted administrative appeals have been noticed in Internal Finland Police and the Eastern Finland Administrative Court, with some filings reportedly containing fabricated case references or distorted legal support; broader prevalence, intent, and legal-system-impact claims still need stronger official corroboration and human review. Bounded official-route follow-up now also shows a reachable ombudsman site-search route and a reachable dedicated ombudsman decisions/statements/inspections search route, but static HTML inspection from this host still exposed only generic search shells rather than clearly extractable same-event cards or explicit zero-state text.
observatory_hook: Procedural-contamination timeline; jurisdiction/language coverage matrix; public-sector workload-cost panel; authority-weighted lead-to-direct-source upgrade funnel.
next_verification_step: Do not replay the same Finland police/justice/Finlex/ombudsman phrase and actor probes unchanged; look next for one exact Finnish police, court, ombudsman, or ministry document identifier, public bulletin, decision publication, or other materially different official route on AI-assisted administrative appeals.
priority_rationale: Direct-source-resolved public-broadcaster row with named institutions, filing type, and bounded workload signal.
current_claim_ceiling: Direct Yle article text supports a narrow claim that Internal Finland Police and the Eastern Finland Administrative Court have noticed AI-assisted administrative appeals, and that some filings reportedly cite non-existent cases or distorted legal practice; the local package still lacks an independent official source, so stronger prevalence or legal-effect claims are out of scope.
paper_use_now: Procedural-contamination timeline; legal/administrative weirdness examples table.
verification_route: Resolve direct Yle article and identify the exact institution and filing type before any broader procedural-contamination claim.
cycle_note: Ranked and route-coded during hostile-reviewer publication sprint; no direct-source URL was newly resolved in this cycle.
resolved_via: Yle public search surface (haku.yle.fi) plus direct article retrieval
next_threshold_event: MTPR-001: official Finnish corroboration for the Yle procedural-contamination row
threshold_gain_if_hit: Create a second stronger Finland support layer for public-institution procedural-contamination wording while keeping prevalence and legality bounded.
route_update_note: 2026-06-08: added ombudsman public site-search and dedicated decision-search shell-ceiling evidence for the Finland/Yle authority-upgrade chase; route stayed non-yielding/opaque and did not change evidence tier.

title_original: Pri Sveti Trojici namesto tajnice (že) umetna inteligenca
title_en_gloss: In Sveta Trojica, artificial intelligence already stands in for a secretary
support_note: Direct Radio Ptuj article text supports a narrow claim that the mayor of the Municipality of Sveta Trojica publicly announced an AI-assisted municipal-secretariat phone agent named Klara that answers calls naturally, recognizes the content of a call, and routes callers to the competent office; the article also says the municipality describes itself as among the first in Slovenia to introduce such a solution in everyday municipal-administration work. Stronger claims about full human replacement, the exact vendor/technical stack, legality, effectiveness, procurement process, or whether any human fallback remains behind the phone channel still require direct municipal documentation and human review. Bounded follow-up now also shows that both main municipal domain variants are portal-wide 403-gated from this shell context and that the reachable EJN public procurement search returns explicit zero states for `Sveta Trojica`, `Klara`, `umetna inteligenca`, `David Klobasa`, and `tajnice`.
observatory_hook: Institutional absurdity queue; municipal service-channel map; authority-weighted lead-to-direct-source upgrade funnel; public-administration phone-routing comparison.
next_verification_step: Count future official-upgrade progress only if one genuinely different municipal/procurement/council-document or browser-mediated route resolves beyond the current 403 portal wall and the current five-query EJN zero-state ceiling.
priority_rationale: Still the best multilingual weird-case candidate for bounded appendix/table use, but the municipal route is now bounded on two fronts: both Sveta Trojica municipal domain variants currently return the same HTTP 403 shell at root, robots, sitemap, and API entry points, while the reachable EJN public procurement search returns explicit zero states for the bounded Sveta Trojica / Klara query set. The row therefore remains a strong local-news exemplar rather than a newly corroborated official or procurement-backed municipal record.
current_claim_ceiling: Direct Radio Ptuj article text supports a narrow claim that the mayor of the Municipality of Sveta Trojica publicly announced an AI-assisted municipal-secretariat phone agent named Klara that answers calls naturally, recognizes the content of a call, and routes callers to the competent office; the article also says the municipality describes itself as among the first in Slovenia to introduce such a solution in everyday municipal-administration work. Stronger claims about full human replacement, the exact vendor/technical stack, legality, effectiveness, procurement process, or whether any human fallback remains behind the phone channel still require direct municipal documentation and human review.
paper_use_now: Reviewer-safe institutional-absurdity / public-administration appendix row with explicit claim ceiling; methods note on upgrading an open regional-radio lead into a direct-source-resolved municipal-service-channel record; cautious comparator for AI theater versus actual workflow substitution.
verification_route: Use the resolved Radio Ptuj article for bounded extraction now. Treat the Municipality of Sveta Trojica domains as currently blocked across root, robots, sitemap, and API entry points from this shell context, and treat the reachable EJN public procurement search as an explicit zero-state across `Sveta Trojica`, `Klara`, `umetna inteligenca`, `David Klobasa`, and `tajnice`; only a genuinely different municipal/procurement/council-document or browser/human route should count as progress.
cycle_note: Added one procurement-family zero-state artifact for the Sveta Trojica/Klara follow-up after the municipal domains remained portal-wide 403-gated from this shell context.
next_threshold_event: MTPR-005: human translation review hardens wording on already resolved rows
threshold_gain_if_hit: Distinguish announced AI-assisted municipal call routing from stronger labor-replacement rhetoric with one direct municipal companion.
provenance_note: Ranked and route-coded during hostile-reviewer publication sprint. Live bounded access checks on 2026-06-08 found both Sveta Trojica municipal domain variants returning the same HTTP 403 shell at root, robots, sitemap, and API entry points, while the reachable EJN public procurement search returned explicit `0 rezultatov iskanja` states for `Sveta Trojica`, `Klara`, `umetna inteligenca`, `David Klobasa`, and `tajnice`. This preserves the row as direct local-news evidence plus bounded official/procurement non-recovery rather than official corroboration.

title_original: Rikosepäily: Mies väärensi tekoälyllä alastonkuvia läheisistä ja työkavereistaan – tekopaikkana pohjoissuomalainen pieni kaupunki
title_en_gloss: Crime suspicion: a man used AI to falsify nude images of relatives and co-workers in a small northern Finnish town
support_note: Public Kaleva article shell plus browser-visible excerpt and meta description now support a narrow claim that a dated regional-news article exists about a police-investigation-framed AI-modified intimate-image abuse case in Finland, with multiple women listed as injured parties/victims, one middle-aged male suspect, a small northern Finnish town, and suspicion-stage offense framing including unauthorized distribution of a sexual image, defamation, and dissemination of information violating personal privacy; fuller chronology, exact locality naming, adjudication, and legal interpretation remain unverified.
observatory_hook: Deepfake abuse cluster with locality suppressed to jurisdiction level for publication-safe mapping; blocker-class matrix; authority-gap overlay.
next_verification_step: Use the direct article shell plus bounded visible excerpt for reviewer-legible limitations prose now; seek one public police companion source or another clearly compliant public document before any promotion beyond queue/limitations use.
priority_rationale: Regional Finnish lead remains the cleanest unresolved multilingual threshold route because the direct article shell is now excerpt-visible with stronger provenance, shrinking the blocker from preview-level mid-state to authority depth plus public-companion non-recovery.
current_claim_ceiling: Public Kaleva article shell plus browser-visible excerpt and meta description now support a narrow claim that a dated regional-news article exists about a police-investigation-framed AI-modified intimate-image abuse case in Finland, with multiple women listed as injured parties/victims, one middle-aged male suspect, a small northern Finnish town, and suspicion-stage offense framing including unauthorized distribution of a sexual image, defamation, and dissemination of information violating personal privacy; full-body chronology, exact locality naming, adjudication, and legal interpretation remain unverified.
paper_use_now: Deepfake abuse cluster; rare-language local-crime comparator; methods note on direct article-shell excerpt states that strengthen provenance without retiring queue-only caution.
verification_route: Use the preview-text-visible direct article shell for bounded route-state and suspicion-stage framing now; seek one clearly matching public police/document companion or fuller readable public surface before any publication-bucket promotion.
cycle_note: Updated required-output propagation after a bounded browser-visible excerpt check: the public Kaleva article shell now supports stronger direct-shell excerpt wording for reviewer-safe limitations/methods use, but the row remains queue-only because fuller readable-body access and public-authority companion depth remain absent.
reviewer_safe_use_now: Deepfake abuse cluster; rare-language local-crime comparator; methods note on metadata-recovered but body-unreadable source states.
next_threshold_event: one public police companion source or another clearly compliant public document that matches the Kaleva row closely enough to justify promotion beyond queue/limitations use
provenance_note: Ranked and route-coded during hostile-reviewer publication sprint. Direct article shell plus bounded visible excerpt re-checked on 2026-06-08 via a single browser pass logged in results/boost/limen-boost-005/kaleva-browser-excerpt-audit.tsv; the row remains queue-only because authority-depth and fuller readable-body access remain absent.
threshold_gain_if_hit: Promote Kaleva from hidden shared-review candidate toward a bounded deepfake-abuse comparator if one compliant readable companion appears.

title_original: AI üle inimaju? Tehisintellekt kukutas Saaremaa gümnasisti eksklikult eksamil läbi
title_en_gloss: AI over the human brain? Artificial intelligence wrongly failed a Saaremaa gymnasium student on an exam
support_note: Estonian-language reporting suggests an AI-linked assessment failure affecting a secondary-school student, but current shell-level host checks show tv3.ee itself is challenge-gated, so the exact AI role remains blocked rather than merely unsearched.
next_verification_step: Deprioritize shell-only retries on tv3.ee until a compliant browser/human path or alternative public source appears.
priority_rationale: The education-governance anomaly remains interesting, but current host-state evidence makes it a weaker immediate route than reachable Finnish or Slovenian news surfaces.
current_claim_ceiling: Broadcast-media lead describing an AI-linked exam-failure anomaly affecting a student.
paper_use_now: Education anomaly matrix; institutional weirdness table; language coverage map.
verification_route: Resolve the Estonian article and determine whether AI made, suggested, or merely informed the failing exam outcome.
cycle_note: Ranked and route-coded during hostile-reviewer publication sprint; no direct-source URL was newly resolved in this cycle.
